title: LineItem
description: A product line item in a cart or order with quantity, pricing, and discount information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the line item within the cart.

productId.description: ID of the product this line item references.

quantity.description: Quantity of this product variant in the cart.

lineItemMode.description: Whether this is a standard or gift line item.

priceMode.description: How the price for this line item is determined.
